## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Unstructured.io and GrowthX to discuss content marketing strategy and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Unstructured wants to dominate search results and own the conversation around enterprise data extraction for AI/ML](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Current focus is on converting open source users and inbound leads from Fortune 1000 companies](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [GrowthX will conduct SEO audit, develop content strategy, and create calibration content for technical and decision-maker ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Unstructured to provide more details on ICPs, competitive landscape, and access to analytics tools](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Approach

  - [Using AirOps platform to generate \~30 articles/month for insights page](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Focusing on keywords/phrases around connectors and organic search terms](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Tarun uses AirOps and has trained other models (Claude, ChatGPT) for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

### Unstructured's Business Model & Target Audience

  - [60,000 companies using open source, 28 million downloads](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Primary focus on Fortune 1000 enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Two key personas: "champion" (technical recommender) and "buyer" (decision maker)](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Self-serve product for smaller companies/startups, but not primary focus](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)

### Content Goals & Strategy

  - [Own search results for unstructured data and Gen AI data topics](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Create "popcorn-like" easily digestible content for quick understanding](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
  - [Develop content that feels like a "default answer" for data transformation in Gen AI use cases](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Leverage podcast, webinar content by repurposing into multiple formats](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)

### GrowthX's Approach

  - [Human-in-the-loop content creation, augmenting writers with AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Will conduct SEO audit, competitive gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
  - [Develop "Content OS" in Airtable to organize topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2966.0)
  - [Create calibration content to align on voice/tone for different ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)

### Voice & Tone Guidelines

  - [Simple, concise, matter-of-fact with a slight smile (similar to Apple's approach)](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)
  - [Technical content should be easy to digest, light on marketing terms/buzzwords](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Avoid exaggeration, especially for technical audience](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2612.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Key competitors: Reducto, Llama Parse, Textract, Azure Form Recognizer](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2327.0)
  - [Some overlap with traditional ETL tools (Airbyte, AWS Glue) but differentiated by AI focus](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)

### Website & CMS

  - [Currently on Framer, transitioning to Sanity CMS in \~2 months](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2790.0)
  - [New site aims for simple, scrollable "popcorn" experience](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Unstructured to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2285.0)
      - [More detailed ICP profiles](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
      - [Competitive landscape details](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
      - [Access to Google Search Console & Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
      - [Examples of preferred content/writing style](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
  - [GrowthX to:](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
      - [Conduct SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
      - [Develop initial content strategy & topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2966.0)
      - [Create calibration content for technical and decision-maker ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to review content strategy and calibration pieces](https://fathom.video/share/SNAkc7iqeFSnEEGGTi8Q4yi4Y8yQZrs1?tab=summary&timestamp=3177.0)
